title: ProjectConfig
description: Per-project forge configuration. Lives at <project-root>/.forge/project.json (CONTRACTS.md C1). Declares the project's demo shape, quality gate, and optional metrics + sweep plug-ins (C26 + C28).

shape.description: How the project surfaces a reviewer-visible demo (CONTRACTS.md C2). browser = Vite/Playwright; harness = test harness with regex-scrapable output; cli-diff = before/after stdout; artifact = generated file/output; none = infra-only initiatives, DEMO.md rationale block.

command.description: Argv-style command the unifier runs to produce the demo. Required when shape != 'none'.

output.description: Output directory relative to worktree root. Default: demo/<initiative-id>/.

baseline.description: Git ref / branch the unifier diffs against for before/after captures. Default: main.

preview_command.description: Required when shape = 'browser'. The dev/preview server command (forge picks a free PORT).

quality_gate_cmd.description: Argv-style command the developer-loop + unifier run between iterations. Must exit 0 on a green tree.

metrics.description: Optional holistic metrics block (CONTRACTS.md C26). Required for any project that wants exploration-shape initiatives (C27); omit otherwise.

sweep.description: Optional parameter-sweep plug-in points (CONTRACTS.md C28). Consumed by skills/project-sweep when the unifier runs in harness-runner mode for type: exploration manifests.
